[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 150
- Description: Partner Check-in Module — full stack implementation
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/245
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/244

  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/285
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/283
  
  Details:
  Implemented the Partner Check-in Module end-to-end to solve the 'poke' problem: Agroverse retail partners going quiet between restocks, running out of stock, and degrading sell-through.
  
  DApp (partner_check_in.html):
  - Mobile-first page with Needs Attention scoring (out of stock, low stock, dormant)
  - Partner dropdown with type-to-filter combobox
  - Stock status, method, restock-needed, next-check-in form
  - RSA-signed [PARTNER CHECK-IN EVENT] submission to Edgar
  - Submit Another flow, desktop two-column layout, cache-bust
  
  Backend (tokenomics):
  - GAS scanner process_partner_check_in_telegram_logs.gs: reads Telegram Chat Logs, dedups on Update ID, appends to Partner Check-ins tab
  - Shipping Planner API extensions: get_partner_check_ins + list_partners_needing_attention
  - SCHEMA.md: Partner Check-ins tab documentation
  - list_partner_contributors action for popup-only partners
  
  Agentic AI Context:
  - PARTNER_CHECK_IN_IMPLEMENTATION.md: full design doc with data flow, event format, testing checklist
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
